response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack experience with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and relevant secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). His AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is a significant plus. While some minor gaps exist (Vitest, PostgreSQL), these are outweighed by his overall expertise and adaptability.
